tour.title: Welcome to Customer 360
tour.content: Let's take a quick tour to explore your new dashboard features and capabilities.

tour.title: Customer Profile
tour.content: Here is the customer profile overview.

tour.title: Key Statistics
tour.content: Quick insights like Net Worth and AI scores are displayed here.

tour.title: Detailed Interactions
tour.content: Click this card to trigger a cinematic 3D detailed view of the customer data.

tour.title: Cinematic Detailed View
tour.content: This immersive view provides deep insights into the customer profile.

tour.title: Data Navigation
tour.content: If a section has a lot of data, it will be paginated. Click this arrow to slide to the next data card.

tour.title: Return to Dashboard
tour.content: Click here to close the detailed view and return to the main dashboard.

tour.title: Quick Module Navigation
tour.content: Use these dots to quickly jump between different modules.

tour.title: Quick Access Modules
tour.content: Click this module card to open the quick view and explore further.

tour.title: Quick Module Layout
tour.content: This interface allows you to view detailed lists or forms without losing your dashboard context.

tour.title: Floating Action Button
tour.content: Click the floating button to return to your main profile view.

tour.title: Thank you please explore your self
tour.content: Let's take a quick tour to explore your new dashboard features and capabilities.
